omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We collect some usage data, such as which features are used and how often. We use this data in aggregate to know what to improve, refactor or remove from the application. We collect a unique user identifier to identify repeated sessions for a given user. We don't cross-reference this identifier with any identifying information. Analytics data is kept for 2 years.

Your documents are uploaded to our backend for backup and synchronization. Your data is encrypted during transmission and at rest. Your documents are retained while you have an active subscription or until deleted. When your account becomes inactive, it's scheduled for deletion within two years. We collect some logs to debug problems in our servers. These logs are archived for up to a year.
When you create an account, we keep some information (email address, device info, IP address) to help you manage your account and ensure security.

If you encounter a technical issue, you may contact us. We will receive your name and email, as well as diagnostics containing detailed logs of the app's activity. This may include document names and user identifiers.
To manage your purchases, we collect minimal information such as a unique user identifier.

If you subscribe to Genius Scan for Teams through our website or other direct billing methods, billing details and payment methods are handled by Stripe. The Grizzly Labs does not store billing information but has access to it through Stripe for managing subscriptions and payments.

If you subscribe through the Apple App Store or Google Play Store, please refer to their respective terms and privacy policies for details on how your billing information is handled. The Grizzly Labs doesn't have access to your billing information but only receives your subscription status from the payment providers.

Genius Scan may request your location for two reasons:
• When you export your scans to a service such as Evernote, you can opt-in to attach your location to the note. That's the only instance where your location information leaves your device.
• The document renaming features of Genius Scan can suggest document names based on your location.
